tools.name: golangci-lint
tools.notes: No custom config file found - uses golangci-lint defaults. Installed automatically by Makefile target.

linting.notes: Linting is run as part of 'make build' and 'make test'. Pre-commit hooks also include shellcheck, hadolint, markdownlint, and yamllint for non-Go files.

env_vars: KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS - set automatically by make test to envtest binaries path
testing.mock_patterns: Uses envtest for controller testing with fake Kubernetes API server
testing.notes: Unit tests exclude e2e tests. E2E tests (test/e2e/) require Kind cluster and llm-d infrastructure - not runnable in basic container. Unit tests use controller-runtime's envtest for Kubernetes controller testing.

gating_checks.name: lint-and-test
gating_checks.notes: Runs on all PRs. Includes go fmt, go vet, golangci-lint, and unit tests.

gating_checks.name: e2e-tests (smoke)
gating_checks.notes: Runs smoke tests on Kind cluster for PRs with code changes. Full E2E suite runs on /trigger-e2e-full comment.

ci.notes: PR checks run lint+unit tests automatically. E2E tests run smoke suite by default, full suite via /trigger-e2e-full comment (requires write access). E2E tests build local Docker image and deploy to Kind cluster.

build.notes: Build includes code generation (controller-gen for CRDs/RBAC), go fmt, go vet, and compilation. Binary output: bin/manager

conventions.test_naming: Ginkgo BDD style with Describe/Context/It blocks for controller tests, Test* functions for package tests
conventions.import_style: Grouped imports: stdlib, third-party, local. Standard Go import ordering.
conventions.notes: Controller tests use envtest suite pattern (suite_test.go files). E2E tests use Ginkgo labels (smoke, full, flaky) for selective execution.

lint_commands.notes: Downloads golangci-lint v2.8.0 automatically, ran successfully with 0 issues

test_commands.notes: All unit tests passed (excludes e2e). Sets up envtest, runs controller tests with coverage.

container_recipe.notes: Container validation successful for unit tests and linting. E2E tests require Kind cluster and cannot run in basic container. Use 'make test-e2e-smoke-with-setup' locally with Kind installed.

results.command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y make git

results.notes: All unit tests passed (33 test packages). E2E tests excluded. Test coverage generated to cover.out.

validation.summary: install OK, dependencies OK, build OK, lint OK (0 issues), tests OK (all unit tests passed)

gaps: No golangci-lint configuration file - uses default linters
E2E tests require Kind cluster with llm-d infrastructure - cannot run in basic container
E2E tests require external dependencies: Kind, kubectl, Docker, Prometheus, Gateway API CRDs
Some test packages have no tests (coverage: 0.0% of statements) - cmd, internal/collector, etc.
No coverage threshold enforced in CI configuration
notes: This is a Kubernetes controller project using kubebuilder/controller-runtime. Unit tests run successfully in a standard Go container. E2E tests require a full Kubernetes environment (Kind cluster) with llm-d components. For patch validation, agents can run lint and unit tests reliably. E2E validation requires infrastructure setup.
